How it works

Simple from mood to meal.

MoodFull uses AI to match your emotional state to recipes you'll actually love — then walks you through every step to get it on the table.

Planner

Plan your whole week by feeling

Pick your mood and build a personalized weekly meal plan that fits how you actually feel — not a generic template.

Shopping

Shop smarter, waste less

Your recipes flow directly into a smart, aisle-organized shopping list. Scan barcodes, add custom items, and shop with less friction.

Cook Mode

Cook with confidence

Step-by-step guided cook mode with built-in timers keeps you focused and in flow — from first ingredient to final plate.
